scoring_scale.4: Experimental or high effort with uncertain ROI
scoring_scale.7: Strong value with moderate guardrails/integration effort
scoring_scale.10: Directly accelerates ISA goal with low incremental risk

recommendations.title: Adopt OpenClaw Gateway + health/logging surfaces as ISA sandboxed operations substrate
opportunities: Deterministic operational entrypoint for automation and incident triage
Unified health/doctor/log patterns usable across ASK_ISA and NEWS_HUB operations
safeguards: Bind gateway to trusted network paths only
Enforce trusted proxy auth and service tokens
Add ISA SLO probes and immutable audit logging
dependencies: Health-check wiring to existing SLO catalog

recommendations.title: Introduce policy-guarded exec/apply_patch lane for controlled remediation workflows
opportunities: Automate bounded maintenance tasks and advisory evidence regeneration
Reduce toil in repeatable compliance update operations
safeguards: Human approval for elevated and filesystem-write operations
Snapshot + rollback procedure before mutating steps

recommendations.title: Use hooks/cron/webhooks for governed NEWS_HUB and ADVISORY refresh loops
opportunities: Continuous ingestion and periodic advisory diff generation
Event-driven updates reduce manual orchestration load
safeguards: Automation kill switch and backoff policies

recommendations.title: Treat skills/plugins ecosystem as quarantined acceleration lane, not production default
opportunities: Fast prototyping for niche connectors and operators
safeguards: Sandbox profile per skill with minimal tool scope

recommendations.title: Adopt browser automation only for fallback evidence capture and exception handling
opportunities: Recover data from systems without stable APIs
safeguards: No autonomous irreversible browser actions without approval

recommendations.title: Build ISA Policy Envelope for OpenClaw actions (formalizable invariants + gate tests)
opportunities: Translate governance doctrine into machine-enforced controls
Create repeatable compliance posture for autonomous actions
safeguards: Invariant tests for no-secret-leak, no-unauthorized-write, citation-required outputs
Automated drift detection against baseline configs

experimentation_paths.title: Sandboxed gateway pilot for NEWS_HUB ingestion loops
experimentation_paths.benchmark: MTTR for failed ingestion jobs, false-positive alert rate, evidence completeness
experimentation_paths.success_criteria: >=30% reduction in manual intervention and complete audit trace on each job
experimentation_paths.rollback: Disable hook/cron set, revert to manual trigger scripts

experimentation_paths.title: Controlled exec lane for advisory regeneration
experimentation_paths.benchmark: Time-to-generate advisory diff pack, policy-violation rate
experimentation_paths.success_criteria: No unauthorized commands, deterministic artifact set across reruns
experimentation_paths.rollback: Revert to current scripted/manual advisory generation path

experimentation_paths.title: Skill quarantine trial with signed allowlist
experimentation_paths.benchmark: Integration velocity vs. security review overhead
experimentation_paths.success_criteria: No policy breaches; review SLA under 1 business day per candidate skill
experimentation_paths.rollback: Block community skill installs; preserve only internal curated skills
